scripts.web:prepare: npm run schema:build && npm run web-sdk:build
scripts.meadow:build:deb: npm run web:prepare && npm run build:deb --workspace meadow
scripts.meadow:dev: npm run web:prepare && npm run dev --workspace meadow
scripts.web:build: npm run web:prepare && npm run meadow:build
scripts.moor:dev: RUST_BACKTRACE=1 cargo run -p moor-server --bin moor -- ./moor-data --db development.db --config-file ${MOOR_CONFIG:-moor-dev.yaml} --import ${MOOR_CORE:-cores/cowbell/src} --import-format objdef --export development-export --generate-keypair --enable-curl-worker
scripts.moor:dev:oauth2: RUST_BACKTRACE=1 cargo run -p moor-server --bin moor -- ./moor-data --db development.db --config-file ${MOOR_CONFIG:-moor-dev-oauth2.yaml} --import ${MOOR_CORE:-cores/cowbell/src} --import-format objdef --export development-export --generate-keypair --enable-curl-worker
scripts.moor:traced: RUST_BACKTRACE=1 cargo run --features trace_events -p moor-server --bin moor -- ./moor-data --db development.db --config-file ${MOOR_CONFIG:-moor-dev.yaml} --import ${MOOR_CORE:-cores/cowbell/src} --import-format objdef --export development-export --generate-keypair --enable-curl-worker --trace-output moor-trace.json
scripts.daemon:dev: RUST_BACKTRACE=1 cargo run -p moor-daemon -- ./moor-data --db development.db --import-format objdef --import ${MOOR_CORE:-cores/cowbell/src} --export development-export --export-format objdef --use-boolean-returns true --custom-errors true --use-uuobjids true --enable-eventlog true --generate-keypair --anonymous-objects true --use-symbols-in-builtins true
scripts.daemon:traced: RUST_BACKTRACE=1 cargo run --features trace_events -p moor-daemon -- ./moor-data --db development.db --import-format objdef --import ${MOOR_CORE:-cores/cowbell/src} --export development-export --export-format objdef --use-boolean-returns true --custom-errors true --use-uuobjids true --enable-eventlog true --trace-output moor-trace.json  --anonymous-objects true
scripts.full:build: npm run web:build && cargo build --release -p moor-server --bin moor
